findings.description: The sentence '本機能を理解するために参照すべき関連文書の一覧。' was added as an introduction to section s1, but the source file contains no such sentence. The source goes directly into the three document entries after the title.
findings.source_evidence: Source has no introductory paragraph before the **UI標準** entry.

findings.description: The target audience '各画面機能の設計者・開発者が' and the stated purpose '画面作成作業の手順を理解しておくため' were omitted. The source specifies that the guide is intended for screen feature designers and developers, and that the reason to read it before this document is to understand the screen creation workflow.
findings.source_evidence: 各画面機能の設計者・開発者が、UI開発基盤を使用して業務画面JSPを作成する際に参照するガイド。画面作成作業の手順を理解しておくため、本書を読む前に必ず通読しておくことが望ましい。
